LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER'S THE TRUSTEES OF THE TEAMSTERS LOCAL UNION NO. 856 HEALTH AND WELFARE FUND'S VERIFIED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE STATUS REPORT FILED BY PETITIONER ON JUNE 18, 2013 SHOWS THAT THE PARTIES HAVE ATTEMPTED TO RESOLVE THE DISPUTE, BUT THEY ARE AT AN IMPASSE. THE PARTIES HAVE MADE EVERY EFFORT TO RESOLVE THE DISPUTE WITHIN THE MEANING OF ARTICLE 10, 10 OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE AGREEMENT. ACCORDINGLY, ARBITRATION IS WARRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing Of Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN P. FLYNN OF THE LAW FIRM OF McLEOD, MOSCARINO & FLYNN LLP, TEL. NO. 874-3405 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. DENNIS G. ROLSTAD OF SEDGWICK LLP, TEL. NO. 781-7900 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner's the trustees of the Teamsters Local Union No. 856 Health and Welfare Fund's Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. The status report filed by Petitioner on June 18, 2013 shows that the parties have attempted to resolve the dispute, but they are at an impasse. The parties have made every effort to resolve the dispute within the meaning of Article 10, 10 of the Administrative Agreement. Accordingly, arbitration is warranted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Ntc Of Hearing Of Verified Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Continued To Jun-24-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John P. Flynn, Esq. of McLeod, Moscarino, Witham & Flynn, Tel. 415.874.3410, for petitioner and moving party;
Dennis G. Rolstad, Esq. of Sedgwick, Tel. 415.781.7900, for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, VERIFIED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is continued to June 24, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Parties are to continue to meet and confer and provide the Court with an update no later than June 20, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
